name: Dome roof
description: Hemispherical dome roof (cúpula) sitting above a roughly square footprint. The radius is half the smaller horizontal dimension; each layer above the base is a hollow Cylinder ring whose radius shrinks along the curve r_y = floor(sqrt(R^2 - y^2)). Apex is a single highlight block (or beacon in fantasy); an optional oculus opens a small skylight at the crown.

required_furniture.rule: Stacked hollow Cylinder rings of decreasing radius approximating a hemisphere.
Single accent block (or minecraft:beacon for fantasy) at the topmost cell.
Glass block replacing the centre of the ring just below the apex; enabled by default when R >= 3.

placement_rules: Roof footprint must equal the underlying structure footprint and be roughly square (|W - D| small).
The equator ring sits at y = aabb.y1 (immediately above the wall AABB); the dome EXTENDS BEYOND aabb.y1.
Hemispherical curve approximated by stacked Cylinder rings: r_y = floor(sqrt(R^2 - y^2)) where R = min(W, D) // 2.
Each ring is HOLLOW (thin shell) so the dome's interior stays open.
Apex highlight at the top cell — a single accent block, or minecraft:beacon in fantasy style.
Oculus optional for light: a centred @glass cell on the ring directly below the apex opens a skylight.
Defensive on footprints from 5×?×5 (R=2) up to 18×?×18 (R=9); outside this range the skill returns no ops.
lighting_ventilation: The optional oculus admits daylight through the apex. Otherwise the dome is opaque and relies on wall windows of the room below.

medieval.notes: Stone shell with an iron-block finial — reads as a romanesque or fortified cupola.

modern.notes: Bright quartz shell with a glowstone apex; oculus reads as a glass skylight.

fantasy.notes: Purpur shell crowned with a beacon, producing a vertical light column from the apex.
